creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to ruben from comment #17)

The curious thing there is that the official "Omnibus" distribution (Linux) doesn't suffer from this problem, not sure why. Maybe they are linked to an older version of Rails?

The downside for us (FreeBSD) is that Gitlab will have no incentive to fix it, because it doesn't exist in the official distribution...
